Title: Import StrideSlip backlog into Linear
Description: Run the Linear importer after a personal API key is saved locally, then verify the project, labels, Done registry, and Todo backlog.

Title: Validate intermittent Apple Health loading
Description: Reproduce cases where HealthKit data does not load on app open and verify refresh status, authorization status, and fallback handling.

Title: Audit Live Activity refresh timing
Description: Confirm Lock Screen step updates after background delivery, foreground refresh, manual refresh, and iOS throttling windows.

Title: Verify no repeated Health onboarding
Description: Confirm users who granted Health permission do not keep seeing the connect/preview onboarding screen.

Title: Run household compete end-to-end
Description: Test Tyron creates a board, Tiffany joins, both sync, both refresh, and errors stay short and clear.

Title: Deploy CloudKit competition schema
Description: Confirm the CloudKit competition schema exists in Development and Production for the app container.

Title: Validate real workout heart-rate zones
Description: Use real stair stepper, strength, and walk workouts to confirm HR zones and chart match Apple Health expectations.

Title: Test cardio detail drill-down
Description: Tap cardio from Insights, inspect zone rows, best session, workout list, and navigation to workout detail.

Title: Test editable heart-rate zones
Description: Edit Zone 2-5 lower bounds, reject invalid ascending values, reset defaults, and verify app-wide updates.

Title: Validate week detail day drill-down
Description: From week insights, tap daily rows and confirm day detail, hourly timeline, cardio summary, and workout navigation.

Title: QA Today hero on real phones
Description: Check Today layout on Tyron and Tiffany phones for readable axis labels, text contrast, no overlap, and safe-area spacing.

Title: QA light theme default
Description: Confirm fresh install defaults to light theme and dark mode remains available by preference.

Title: QA dark theme contrast
Description: Review Today, Activity, Compete, Insights, Settings, and workout detail in dark mode for readability.

Title: Validate Activity filters after relaunch
Description: Set mode, day filter, sort, and workout filter; relaunch app and confirm choices persist.

Title: Validate Insights scope persistence
Description: Switch Day, Week, Month; relaunch app and confirm the chosen scope persists without changing Today.

Title: Capture updated share card screenshots
Description: Generate day, strength, stair stepper, indoor walk, and outdoor walk share cards for visual QA and website assets.

Title: Validate outdoor route map privacy
Description: Confirm route maps render locally and no route points appear in CloudKit records, diagnostics, or copied text.

Title: Test Watch companion with device
Description: Install on paired Apple Watch and confirm aggregate snapshot behavior without exposing raw Health data.

Title: Validate App Intents
Description: Test shortcuts for today steps, open Compete, and sync household board on a physical iPhone.

Title: Run TestFlight beta acceptance
Description: Upload a build, process in App Store Connect, invite Tiffany, install through TestFlight, and verify onboarding.

Title: Complete App Store privacy labels
Description: Make App Store Connect labels match aggregate Health/Fitness use, no tracking, and no raw HealthKit upload.

Title: Refresh README screenshots
Description: Replace old screenshots with current Today, Activity, Compete, Insights, and workout detail captures.

Title: Publish website project update
Description: Add a separate StrideSlip project/status section on tyronsamaroo.dev without changing existing stats, skills, experience, education, or project content.

Title: Finalize app name and icon direction
Description: Choose final app name, icon concept, and display name while preserving bundle identifier compatibility.

Title: Polish workout tagging UX
Description: Make Push/Pull/Leg/custom training tags fast to apply from workout detail and easy to edit later.

Title: Add deeper monthly insights
Description: Improve monthly summaries with best weeks, cardio/strength split, heat map, and goal pacing.

Title: Add stronger weekly receipts
Description: Make weekly receipts richer for sharing and comparison, including workouts, cardio, strength, steps, distance, burn, and trends.

Title: Add HealthKit troubleshooting banner
Description: When data looks stale, show a compact status with last refresh, permission hint, and retry action.

Title: Improve Compete empty/error states
Description: Make missing CloudKit, missing schema, offline, and no-household states obvious without giant scary errors.

Title: Create Linear views for StrideSlip
Description: Create Linear views for Needs Validation, Today/HealthKit, Compete, Insights, and Release after import.
